zh.Leighton, Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓
zh.Warrington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Villiers於1135年出生在英國藍卡爾沃林頓時，她的父親Matthew de Villiers20歲，母親Agatha Le Angevin28歲。她於1151年與Sir Richard le Boteler在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1165年在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Villiers于1135年出生在英国藍卡爾沃林頓时，她的父亲Matthew de Villiers20岁，母亲Agatha Le Angevin28岁。她于1151年与Sir Richard le Boteler在英国英格兰史洛普爾麗頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1165年在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Villiers was born in 1135, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, her father, Matthew de Villiers, was 20 and her mother, Agatha Le Angevin, was 28. She married Sir Richard le Boteler in 1151, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1165, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Villiers est née en 1135, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew de Villiers, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agatha Le Angevin, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard le Boteler en 1151, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1165, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Villiers 1135 in Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew de Villiers 20 und ihre Mutter Agatha Le Angevin 28. Sie hat 1151 in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1165 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Villiers è nata il nel 1135 nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Matthew de Villiers, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agatha Le Angevin, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard le Boteler nel 1151, nel Leighton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1165, nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Villiersが1135年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで生まれた時，父Matthew de Villiersは20歳，母Agatha Le Angevinは28歳であった。1151年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンでSir Richard le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1165年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Villiers(이)가 1135년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew de Villiers(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha Le Angevin(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1151년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 Sir Richard le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Villiers nasceu em 1135, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew de Villiers, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agatha Le Angevin, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard le Boteler em 1151, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1165, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Villiers родилась в 1135 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Matthew de Villiers было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha Le Angevin, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard le Boteler в 1151 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1165 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Villiers nació en 1135, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew de Villiers, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agatha Le Angevin, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Richard le Boteler en 1151, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1165, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
